releases.label: DR1
releases.summary: eRASS1 release (western Galactic hemisphere): ~930,000 X-ray sources from the first all-sky survey pass, with source catalogs, spectra and calibrated event files.

releases.label: EDR
releases.summary: Early Data Release: eFEDS performance-verification field (140 deg², ~27,910 X-ray sources) plus calibration observations.
